description: This file defines affirmative yes–no question formation in the Going-to Future construction in Njo Viri (Balanda). These questions ask whether a planned or intended future action will take place.

general_principle.statement: Going-to future positive questions in Balanda are formed by keeping the affirmative going-to structure unchanged and adding the question marker 'we?' at the end of the sentence.

question_structure.structure: Subject + no + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement) + we?
constraints: The motion verb 'tiyai' must remain unchanged
The connector 'va' must link to the final base verb
The final verb must remain in base form
The question marker 'we?' must be sentence-final

semantic_function.meaning: asks about intention, plan, or expected future action

error_constraints: Do not use 'ti-' on the final verb
Do not add 'gba' in positive questions
Do not move 'we?' from sentence-final position

balanda: Ne no tiyai va ja se we?
english: Am I going to eat fish?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va nzü ngo we?
english: Is she going to drink water?

balanda: Danda no tiyai va teli muru famvara we?
english: Are we going to sleep on the bed?

balanda: Uku no tiyai va yai we?
english: Is Uku going to go?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va dhii ba we?
english: Is Ngande going to come home?

balanda: Ndi no tiyai va nonö gbi difo we?
english: Are they going to walk in the compound?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va nangele zanga we?
english: Is she going to run fast?

balanda: Uku no tiyai va mande gbi njü we?
english: Is Uku going to work in the garden?

balanda: Wiki no tiyai va moliki gbi difo we?
english: Is the child going to play in the compound?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va loro voro we?
english: Am I going to watch the dog?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va vele njo balanda we?
english: Am I going to speak Balanda?

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va sudi kavoso we?
english: Is the girl going to write words?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va dheke kitabu we?
english: Am I going to read a book?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va teri ay we?
english: Is he going to think about it?

balanda: Ndi no tiyai va ŋiyi ay we?
english: Are they going to know it?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va we ndi we?
english: Am I going to ask them?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va vele zi ndi we?
english: Is Ngande going to tell them?

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va keye ti naa ni we?
english: Is the girl going to call her mother?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va merego ŋo we?
english: Am I going to love you?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va maguku ti kpörö we?
english: Is he going to fear the snake?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va sogo ni we?
english: Is she going to hate him?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va riki ni we?
english: Is Ngande going to surprise him?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va dovee kurru we?
english: Is he going to seem calm?

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va yele tamma we?
english: Is the girl going to tie the shoe?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va di kalla we?
english: Is he going to cut the pot?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va tele njokoji we?
english: Am I going to pull the door?

balanda: Danda no tiyai va turu songo we?
english: Are we going to push the box?

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va soko tamma we?
english: Is the girl going to wash the shoe?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va kuru kavokau we?
english: Am I going to hide the beads?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va ngö tiyi we?
english: Is Ngande going to build a house?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va suru kavoso we?
english: Am I going to create words?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va giri kavoso we?
english: Is she going to change the words?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va kara njokoji we?
english: Am I going to turn the door?

balanda: Danda no tiyai va toko villi we?
english: Are we going to add money?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va kefo Balanda we?
english: Am I going to describe Balanda?

balanda: Ndi no tiyai va konu nvesani we?
english: Are they going to help the poor?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va ndugu mira we?
english: Is Ngande going to initiate the project?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va maforo mira we?
english: Am I going to contribute to the project?

balanda: Wilii no tiyai va sarwa kumere we?
english: Is the girl going to separate trash?

balanda: Danda no tiyai va kiri tidina we?
english: Are we going to uphold the law?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va duru ngo we?
english: Am I going to want water?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va ze villi we?
english: Is she going to give money?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va dhe villi we?
english: Am I going to find money?

balanda: Uku no tiyai va mele vongu we?
english: Is Uku going to try the cloth?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va si ba we?
english: Is Ngande going to leave home?

balanda: Ne no tiyai va lu Wau we?
english: Am I going to arrive in Wau?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va fagi mva we?
english: Is he going to sharpen the knife?

balanda: Ngande no tiyai va dewe kakpodu we?
english: Is Ngande going to imitate adults?

balanda: Danda no tiyai va bita mira we?
english: Are we going to start the project?

balanda: Ni no tiyai va teta we?
english: Is he going to fall?
